word: G2022 - ἐπιχέω - epichéō - ep-ee-kheh'-o - To pour upon

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιχέω

- Transliteration: Epicheo

- Phonetic: ep-ee-kheh'-o

- Definition:

1. to pour upon

- Origin: from G1909 and cheo (to pour)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and χέω cheō (to pour); to pour upon: - pour in.
